title: A1 Reading 2 — At The Movies: Bollywood
subtitle: One passage · Gaps, headings, MCQ

passages.title: At The Movies: Bollywood
passages.passageHtml:
The word "Bollywood" is a mix of the words "Bombay" (a city in India now called "Mumbai") and "Hollywood". Bollywood is the largest movie-making business in India (and the world). Every year, Bollywood makes more movies and money than Hollywood does.

Bollywood movies share certain features. First, most Bollywood films are a minimum of three hours long. The movie usually stops in the middle and people take a short break.

Also many Bollywood movies are about love. Often in a story, the boy's parents don't like the girl, or the girl's parents don't like the boy. The lovers, divided by their families, try to be together.

Another important part of Bollywood movies is music. Singing and dancing in a Bollywood film is very common. The music is often a mix of Indian pop songs and traditional melodies. Some people think the music is as important as the movie's story. In some Indian theaters, people watching the movie will sing and dance with the performers on screen!

sections.label: Part A
sections.instructions: Match the sentences (a-f) with the gaps (1-4). There are two extra sentences.

options.text: The endings also very typically include dancing.
It is a representation of how important music is in Indian Culture.
While some people believe that Hollywood is the number one in the industry, the reality is different.
The movie 'LOC: Kargil' with 4 hours and 25 minutes, is the longest film in the world.
Bollywood movies are famous for the colourful dresses of the actors and actresses.
The movies also include more than one story at a time.

sections.label: Part B
sections.instructions: Read the text and match the paragraphs with the topics. There is one extra.

options.text: What is the role of music in Bollywood movies?
Why do people watching the movie sing and dance?
What are most Bollywood films about?
What is Bollywood?
How long is an average Bollywood movie?

sections.label: Part C
sections.instructions: Answer the questions according to the text.

items.question: What is the purpose of this passage?

options.text: to describe Hollywood movies
to introduce readers to Bollywood films
to show the similarities between Hollywood and Bollywood movies
to show the differences between Hollywood and Bollywood movies
Bollywood movies come from Britain.
Hollywood makes the most movies in the world.
Most Bollywood movies are different from each other.
The word "Bollywood" comes from the name of an Indian city + "Hollywood".
very short
in English
love stories
four hours with no break

items.question: How many Bollywood films have singing and dancing?

options.text: almost all
some
very few
none

items.question: Which sentence about the music in Bollywood movies is true?

options.text: It is American pop music.
Music is not very important in a movie.
Sometimes movie viewers sing with the actors.
Usually, the movies have only traditional Indian songs.
